status_reason: StoryCluster production readiness is release_ready, the local public/remote Web PWA feed browser smoke passed, and approvals/owners were recorded from operator-provided inputs. The packet remains blocked because public self-hosted deployment cannot proceed truthfully without DNS registrar access, inbound router/firewall reachability, TLS issuance ability, and noninteractive host admin/service-manager permissions; therefore public WSS Mesh release_ready and production app canary pass are not proven.

news_daemon_stack_startup.summary: Build @vh/luma-sdk before @vh/gun-client for news daemon runtime imports.

analysis_relay_gpt5_empty_content_compat.summary: Expand completion-token budget across missing-content retries, preserve finish-reason diagnostics, and read text-array choice content.

upstream_auth_error_redaction.summary: Redact API-key-shaped upstream error text and expose machine-readable auth failure classification on the analysis health path.

env_profile_diagnosis.secret_printing: not printed; OPENAI_API_KEY and ANALYSIS_RELAY_API_KEY presence verified only

current_clean_mesh_observations: public WSS deployment was not attempted because external infrastructure gates failed before changes
required public peer endpoints and signed peer config are not deployed
mesh_and_app_canary.production_app_canary_downstream_observa: public deployment and Mesh release_ready prerequisites blocked

approvals.external_legal_rationale: public beta copy makes no regulated/commercial/legal claims
approvals.rollback_rationale: fresh launch, no release version, no userbase, no migration

allowed_launch_copy: Web PWA MVP public beta candidate for the implemented scope.
Source health passed the complete release evidence window.
LUMA public-beta is MVP-production-ready as a fail-closed beta-local identity and signed-write layer.
Release-shaped public/remote analysis health passed using the Mac-mini-local release env path recorded in this packet.
StoryCluster production readiness is release_ready as of the recorded production-readiness report.

Local public/remote Web PWA feed smoke passed with current headlines, source labels, timestamps, detail, accepted synthesis, identity, stance, comments, reload persistence, and second-browser visibility.
Public self-hosted WSS Mesh, production app canary, and public https://venn.carboncaste.io deployment remain blocked on external infrastructure access and are not release-ready in this packet.
forbidden_claims: downstream production app surfaces observed end to end
native App Store or TestFlight readiness

local_host.service_manager: launchctl user context available; system/privileged service changes still require admin authentication

blockers.observed: carboncaste.io uses Namecheap nameservers dns1.registrar-servers.com and dns2.registrar-servers.com; venn.carboncaste.io and gun-a/gun-b/gun-c.venn.carboncaste.io have no A records; no NAMECHEAP/CLOUDFLARE/AWS/ROUTE53 DNS API credentials are present in the process environment.
blockers.required_human_action: Provide registrar/DNS API access or create A/AAAA records for venn.carboncaste.io, gun-a.venn.carboncaste.io, gun-b.venn.carboncaste.io, and gun-c.venn.carboncaste.io pointing at the intended public ingress.

blockers.observed: The Mac mini and ssh humble both report public IPv4 129.222.193.128; inbound TCP 80 and 443 to 129.222.193.128 timed out, including from the humble host. carboncaste.io currently resolves to 38.45.14.38 and https://carboncaste.io also timed out.
blockers.required_human_action: Provide router/firewall/NAT control or an alternate public ingress so inbound 80/443 and WSS traffic can reach the selected bootstrap hosts.

blockers.observed: sudo -n true requires a password on both the Mac mini and humble. The Mac user is in admin, and humble is in sudo, but noninteractive service/firewall/privileged-port administration is not available to this agent.
blockers.required_human_action: Provide noninteractive sudo/admin rights or preinstall the service, firewall, and privileged-port configuration required for 443/TLS/WSS.

blockers.observed: No caddy/certbot/nginx binary is installed on either host, and DNS plus inbound 80/443 are not available for ACME DNS-01 or HTTP-01 validation.
blockers.required_human_action: Provide TLS tooling plus DNS challenge credentials, or open inbound 80/443 and authorize installation/configuration of an ACME-capable reverse proxy.

blockers.observed: The required public WSS peers wss://gun-a.venn.carboncaste.io/gun, wss://gun-b.venn.carboncaste.io/gun, and wss://gun-c.venn.carboncaste.io/gun cannot be truthfully deployed or probed until DNS, inbound reachability, TLS, and service permissions are available.
blockers.required_human_action: After the above access is provided, deploy the three public WSS peers without lowering Mesh thresholds and run the public WSS proof.

explicit_non_claims: public WSS bootstrap mesh is deployed
LUMA Silver, verified-human identity, one-human-one-vote, Sybil resistance, production attestation, or native App Store/TestFlight readiness
